config.title: Client Services & Operations Professional
config.about: A client-facing professional shaped by high-stakes environments — consular services, complex operations, and financial transactions where precision is the baseline. Structured process thinking, composure under pressure, and the instinct to navigate both the operational and the human side of every interaction. As a native Portuguese speaker with deep roots in Brazilian culture, I bring the cultural fluency that Latin American private banking demands at the highest level.
config.stat0l: Years of experience in the US
config.hubTitle: The profile you were looking for. Matched.
config.hubSub: Every requirement from the posting maps directly to experience. Click each card to confirm.
config.contactStatusText: Active process · Multiple conversations in progress
config.contactSubtitle: This portal was created for this application. If what you've read adds context — a conversation is one click away.
config.recQ1: "His profile reflects institutional reliability, professional integrity, and the capacity to contribute with purpose and effectiveness in demanding environments. I am confident that he will bring these same qualities to any organization he joins."
config.recQ2: "During his tenure, Mr. Rossi consistently distinguished himself through his diligence, efficiency, and commitment to his professional responsibilities. He demonstrated excellent written and oral communication skills, coupled with a high degree of organization and the ability to carry out his responsibilities with autonomy and reliability."
config.recSigneeTitle: Deputy Consul General · Consulate General of Brazil in Miami
config.c1desc: Supported citizens through consular service requests across documentation, renewals, and appointments. Brought in on escalated cases requiring calm judgment and individual attention — each situation treated as its own.
config.c1proof: Consulate General of Brazil · Escalated cases handled with senior management oversight
config.c2desc: Proactively called clients to guide them through the digital process step by step, and served as designated IT backup — troubleshooting connectivity, servers, and equipment during staff absences.
config.c2proof: Consulate digital platform · Direct client guidance · IT coverage
config.c3desc: Walked clients through digital processes, tailoring communication to each person's level. Co-developed a narrated video tutorial addressing the most common client pain points — giving the team a ready-made resource to share alongside email responses.
config.c3proof: Narrated tutorial · Staff onboarding · Real-time digital guidance
config.c4desc: Identified that a shared Excel spreadsheet was creating a real bottleneck — slow load times, impractical data entry, the whole team waiting on the same file. Translated the operational pain into clear requirements for IT, who built a new process documentation system that replaced it.
config.c4proof: Excel → IT-built system · Requirements translation · Team adoption
config.c5desc: Acted as the operational hub across clients, vendors, logistics partners, and office administration — negotiating terms, managing timelines, and supporting payment processing and dual-control bank transfers.
config.c5proof: VR Capital LLC · Supported a primary client engagement over a five-year period.
config.c6desc: Managed case queues via email and in-person channels, tracking every request through to resolution with complete documentation. Maintained accuracy under high volume — including during a 2-day system outage with a 100+ case backlog.
config.c6proof: IT ticket management · Priority queuing · Full-cycle case documentation
config.c7desc: Native Portuguese speaker with full professional proficiency across verbal, written, and client-facing contexts. Every touchpoint a Brazilian client encounters, covered with authenticity.
config.daysSub: A structured plan — not theory. What this hire looks like in practice.
config.d1Items: Dedicated to onboarding and full licensing completion — SIE, Series 63, and Series 7 — with preparation already underway. No divided attention. One objective. Full focus.
config.d2Items:
Contribute. Integrate. Build.
Independent caseload, Portuguese-language client sessions, and active workflow observation — contributing to the team's ongoing refinement as the landscape evolves.
config.d3Items: Full caseload across all complexity tiers, trusted relationships building with LatAm clients and internal teams, and a consistent eye on what the team and the practice can do better, documented where it matters.
config.yr1Text: Licensed track opened. Onboarding absorbed. Foundation set.
config.yr1Benefit: By month three, the team gains a prepared presence. Licensed, oriented, and ready to contribute.
config.yr2Text: Caseload running. Client sessions independent. Patterns being read.
config.yr2Benefit: A team member who knows the workflow, knows the clients, and is making the practice incrementally sharper.
config.yr3Text: Complexity handled. Connections built. Quietly improving what can be improved.
config.yr3Benefit: Nine months of context — and already making the practice incrementally sharper.
config.yr4Benefit: A Digital Concierge with the context, the credentials, and a foundation built for what comes next. Including the cross-functional work that makes the practice better from the inside.
config.eduHeading: Building to *understand the system*, not just use it.
config.cred1Body: PUC-Campinas, Brazil · Equivalent to a U.S. four-year degree
config.cred2Body: 2023 · Systems thinking, troubleshooting, network & security fundamentals
config.cred3Body: Cloud computing · Log analysis · Operational intelligence · Microsoft 365 & Google Workspace
config.cred4Body: Self-study · Financial markets & instruments · Private Banking regulatory context
config.yr2Body: Phase 2 complete: Independent case handling across all tiers, Series 7 preparation active, LatAm client trust established.
config.yr3Body: A concrete efficiency gain on the table. Caseload fully owned. Two active licensing tracks progressing simultaneously.
config.yr4Body: Year one milestone: fully licensed, full ownership of LatAm client segment, qualified for Senior Digital Concierge.

en.expOrg1: Consulate General of Brazil in Miami
en.expBullets1:
• Primary contact for citizens navigating digital and in-person service channels — exactly the Digital Concierge model applied to a government environment.
  • Diagnosed and resolved platform issues in real time (session resets, cache clearing, connectivity, system restarts), escalating to IT with full ticket documentation when needed.
  • Co-developed a narrated video tutorial to guide applicants through the online passport process — reducing recurring errors and improving service scale.
  • Worked directly with IT to translate operational workflows into system requirements, participated in development meetings, and provided feedback for a new internal admin tool.
  • Trained new staff on internal systems — structured knowledge transfer, consistent team performance.
en.expOrg2: Consulate General of Brazil in Miami
en.expBullets2:
• Coordinated public-facing events for diverse audiences, managed logistics and execution.
  • Created video and social media content for departmental outreach.
en.expRole3: Operations Support & Process Coordination — Private Clients
en.expBullets3:
• Coordinated payments, wire transfers, vendor management, and multi-party documentation for private clients — dual-control financial operations requiring zero-error precision.
  • Developed workflow documentation and tracking structures; provided research-driven operational support for high-stakes client decisions.
en.expEarlier: Guest Relations · Disneyland Resort Paris  ·  Financial Advisor / Bank Teller · Brazil  ·  Customer Service · Quebec, Canada

kbOverrides.0: Joao Victor is a client services and operations professional built for high-stakes environments. At the Consulate General of Brazil in Miami, he was the go-to person for citizens navigating complex digital and in-person processes — proactively resolving frustrated client situations, troubleshooting government systems, training staff, and collaborating with IT to build a new internal tool. Before that, he coordinated wire transfers and multi-party financial operations at VR Capital. He speaks Portuguese (native), English, Spanish, and French at professional level, holds CompTIA Network+ and Security+ certifications, and is currently studying for the SIE exam.
kbOverrides.17: Joao Victor is based in Miami, FL (a walking distance from JPMC building actually) and available to start
